2605.10157.title: MolSight: Molecular Property Prediction with Images
2605.10157.paper_summary: Every molecule ever synthesised can be drawn as a 2D skeletal diagram, yet in modern property prediction this universally available representation has received less focus in favour of molecular graphs, 3D conformers, or billion-parameter language models, each imposing its own computational and data-engineering overhead. We present $\textbf{MolSight}$, the first systematic large-scale study of vision-based Molecular Property Prediction (MPP). Using 10 vision architectures, 7 pre-training strategies, and $2\,M$ molecule images, we evaluate performance across 10 downstream tasks spanning physical-property regression, drug-discovery classification, and quantum-chemistry prediction. To account for the wide variation in structural complexity across pre-training molecules, we further propose a $\textbf{chemistry-informed curriculum}$: five structural complexity descriptors partition the corpus into five tiers of increasing chemical difficulty, consistently outperforming non-curriculum baselines. We show that a single rendered bond-line image, processed by a vision encoder, is sufficient for competitive molecular property prediction, i.e. $\textit{chemical insight from sight alone}$. The best curriculum-trained configuration achieves the top result on $\textbf{5 of 10}$ benchmarks and top two on $\textbf{all 10}$, at $\textbf{$\textit{80$\times$ lower}$}$ FLOPs than the nearest multi-modal competitor.
2605.10157.paper_summary_zh: 每個合成的分子都可以繪製為 2D 骨架圖，但在現代屬性預測中，這種普遍可用的表示方式卻較少受到關注，反而偏向於分子圖、3D 构象或十億參數的語言模型，每種方法都帶來了各自的計算和數據工程負擔。我們提出了 $\textbf{MolSight}$，這是首個系統性的大規模基於視覺的分子屬性預測 (MPP) 研究。使用 10 種視覺架構、7 種預訓練策略和 $2\,M$ 分子圖像，我們評估了在 10 個下游任務中的性能，這些任務涵蓋了物理屬性回歸、藥物發現分類和量子化學預測。為了考慮預訓練分子結構複雜性的廣泛變化，我們進一步提出了一個 $\textbf{化學知識指導的課程}$：五個結構複雜性描述符將語料庫劃分為五個逐漸增加化學難度的層級，並持續超越非課程基準。我們顯示，單一渲染的鍵線圖像，經過視覺編碼器處理，足以進行具有競爭力的分子屬性預測，即 $\textit{僅憑視覺獲得的化學洞察}$。最佳的課程訓練配置在 $\textbf{10 個基準中的 5 個}$ 上取得了最佳結果，在 $\textbf{所有 10 個}$ 中則名列前二，且其計算量為 $\textbf{$\textit{低 80$\times$}$}$ FLOPs，遠低於最近的多模態競爭者。
2605.10157.author: Aaditya Baranwal et.al.
2605.10157.authors: Aaditya Baranwal, Akshaj Gupta, Shruti Vyas, Yogesh S Rawat
